---
title: "Build with us"
description: "Add a component, extend a workflow, or improve the docs."
order: 0
listing:
  id: contributing
  type: table
  contents:
    - getting-started.qmd
    - project-structure.qmd
    - creating-components.qmd
    - creating-pipelines.qmd
    - running-tests.qmd
    - pull-requests.qmd
  fields: [title, description]
  field-display-names:
    title: "Step"
    description: "What it covers"
  sort: false
  filter-ui: false
  sort-ui: false
---

OpenPipeline is open source. The path in, in order:

:::{#contributing}
:::

## Code of conduct

OpenPipeline adopts the
[Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/) — we pledge to keep
the community welcoming, inclusive, and harassment-free. By taking part you agree
to uphold it. Please read the full
[Code of Conduct](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
before participating.
